description: L4 Fibonacci, strict example-only, Variant A. Tests whether frontier models crack L4.

results.model_response:
```
def fib(n):
    if n == 0:
        return 0    # base value
    if n == 1:
        return 1    # base value
    return fib(n - 1) + fib(n - 2)   # recursive step

print(fib(0))
print(fib(1))
print(fib(2))
print(fib(3))
print(fib(4))
print(fib(5))
print(fib(6))
```
